description: Klariti design language: minimal, warm, and wellness-forward. Built on neutral cream and dark tones with sage green accents. Clean sans-serif typography (Poppins) with optional serif (Literata) for expressive moments. Calm motion, accessible contrast, and class-based dark mode. Everything is intentionally understated — no bright primaries, no aggressive UI chrome.

sans.name: Poppins
sans.usage: Primary UI font — body text, labels, navigation, headings

serif.name: Literata
serif.usage: Accent serif — pull quotes, editorial content, expressive headings

mono.name: Space Mono
mono.usage: Code blocks, technical content, monospaced data

notes: Warm, off-white backgrounds — never pure white in light mode
Accent and link color is forest/sage green — used sparingly
Dark mode uses very dark gray (not pure black) for comfort
Scrollbars are 4px thin with transparent track
Focus rings use --ring variable with ring-offset for accessibility
Screen-line utilities draw full-width horizontal rules via ::before/::after
font-synthesis-weight: none to prevent faux bold
